title: Resignation
content:
Long had I grieved at what I deemed abuse;
    But now I am as grain within the mill.
    If so be thou must crush me for thy use,
    Grind on, O potent God, and do thy will!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Laurence Dunbar, titled "Resignation", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
